title: juncus bufonius subsp. nastanthus
intro: Juncus bufonius subsp. nastanthus, also known as the toad rush, is a plant species that belongs to the family Juncaceae. It is a perennial herb that has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The toad rush is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, preventing infections, and aiding in wound healing. To utilize the plant's medicinal properties, it can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, making it a valuable addition to traditional herbal remedies.
